extensionName.message: Copy Font Awesome Icon Class Name
extensionName.description: The extended name, which is displayed on the management page and the store.

extensionDescription.message: Insert a button in the icon details interface of Font Awesome. Clicking this button allows you to copy the class name of the current icon with one click.

cpyBtnTooltipText.description: The default text displayed in the tooltip for the Copy button.

cpyBtnTooltipTextCopySuccess.description: The text displayed in the tooltip for the Copy button when copying is successful.

cpyBtnTooltipTextCopyFail.description: The text displayed in the tooltip for the Copy button when copying fails.
